lesson.title: Meet Mallam
lesson.subject: Lumo Fundamentals
lesson.readinessFocus: Learn who Mallam is, how the tablet speaks, and how to answer one short guided prompt.
lesson.scenario: The learner meets Mallam for the first time and practices listening, pointing, and repeating in a calm offline session.

activitySteps.title: Mallam says hello
activitySteps.prompt: Listen to Mallam say hello, then say hello back.
activitySteps.detail: Starter introduction step for first-run tablet orientation.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner listens, stays engaged, and attempts a spoken hello.
facilitatorNotes: Keep the pace slow and friendly.

activitySteps.title: Find Mallam
activitySteps.prompt: Tap the picture that shows Mallam.
activitySteps.detail: Uses local bundled image support when final media is present; currently prepared with manifest-backed placeholders only.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner can pick the guided character card with one cue.
facilitatorNotes: If local image cards are not installed yet, read the labels aloud and point physically.
Do not block lesson completion if media is still pending.

activitySteps.title: Say your ready phrase
activitySteps.prompt: Say: I am ready to learn.
activitySteps.detail: Simple spoken confidence close for the first bundled lesson.
activitySteps.evidence: Learner attempts the full readiness phrase with support if needed.
facilitatorNotes: Replay the phrase once before prompting a second try.

items.notes: Final learner-facing art not added yet. Keep manifest stable so the runtime can resolve it once supplied.
Reserved slot for future local greeting audio.
